issueCodes.title: Critical accessibility claim not verified
issueCodes.description: A critical accessibility claim is release-relevant but is not marked as verified.
issueCodes.resolution: Set coverage to verified and provide a verification method other than not-verified with evidence.

issueCodes.title: Reviewed compliance mapping not verified
issueCodes.description: A compliance mapping marked reviewed is missing verification evidence.
issueCodes.resolution: Use a verification method other than not-verified and provide evidence, or lower coverage until review is complete.

issueCodes.title: Duplicate workspace dependency alias
issueCodes.description: A workspace declares the same dependency alias more than once.
issueCodes.resolution: Give each dependency declaration a unique alias.

issueCodes.title: Unknown workspace dependency alias
issueCodes.description: A reference uses an alias-qualified dependency target, but the workspace does not declare that dependency alias.
issueCodes.resolution: Declare the dependency alias in verityspec.json or update the reference target.

issueCodes.title: Invalid workspace dependency declaration
issueCodes.description: A workspace dependency declaration is missing required local dependency fields or uses an invalid shape.
issueCodes.resolution: Declare dependency id, alias, source, optional version, and readonly mode using the supported local dependency shape.

issueCodes.title: Invalid dependency exports
issueCodes.description: A dependency workspace exports list is not an array of record ID strings.
issueCodes.resolution: Set exports to an array of record IDs that the dependency intentionally exposes to consumers.

issueCodes.title: Workspace dependency ID mismatch
issueCodes.description: A declared dependency ID does not match the workspace loaded from the dependency source path.
issueCodes.resolution: Update the dependency id or source path so the declaration and loaded workspace agree.

issueCodes.title: Workspace dependency failed to load
issueCodes.description: A declared local workspace dependency could not be parsed or loaded.
issueCodes.resolution: Fix the dependency workspace files or point source at a valid VeritySpec workspace.

issueCodes.title: Unsupported workspace dependency mode
issueCodes.description: A workspace dependency declares a mode other than readonly.
issueCodes.resolution: Set dependency mode to readonly for the local dependency prototype.

issueCodes.title: Missing workspace dependency reference target
issueCodes.description: A dependency-qualified reference points to a record ID that does not exist in the dependency workspace.
issueCodes.resolution: Create and export the target record in the dependency workspace or update the reference.

issueCodes.title: Workspace dependency reference not exported
issueCodes.description: A dependency-qualified reference points to a record that exists but is not exported by the dependency workspace.
issueCodes.resolution: Add the target record ID to the dependency workspace exports list or reference an exported record.

issueCodes.title: Missing workspace dependency source
issueCodes.description: A local workspace dependency source path does not exist.
issueCodes.resolution: Create the dependency workspace at the source path or update the dependency declaration.

issueCodes.title: Missing workspace dependency version
issueCodes.description: A dependency declaration includes a version constraint but the loaded dependency workspace has no version.
issueCodes.resolution: Add a version to the dependency workspace manifest or remove the version constraint.

issueCodes.title: Workspace dependency version unsatisfied
issueCodes.description: A loaded dependency workspace version does not satisfy the consuming workspace dependency constraint.
issueCodes.resolution: Update the dependency source or version constraint so they agree.

issueCodes.title: Production deployment controls missing
issueCodes.description: A production deployment target is missing required release approval, rollback, health-check, security, observability, compliance, or release evidence links.
issueCodes.resolution: Require release approval, declare a rollback plan, add a production healthCheckUrl, and link security controls, observability dashboards, compliance mappings, and release evidence records.

issueCodes.title: Reference cycle
issueCodes.description: A directed reference path loops back to an earlier record.
issueCodes.resolution: Break the cycle by removing or changing one reference edge.

issueCodes.title: Orphan record
issueCodes.description: A non-product, non-schema record has no incoming or outgoing graph references.
issueCodes.resolution: Reference the record from a product or another record, or remove it.

issueCodes.title: Missing description
issueCodes.description: A record should include a useful human-readable description.
issueCodes.resolution: Add a non-empty description field.

issueCodes.title: Placeholder owner
issueCodes.description: The owner field uses a placeholder value.
issueCodes.resolution: Set owner to the team, person, or system responsible for the record.

issueCodes.title: Draft record
issueCodes.description: Draft records are not considered release-ready.
issueCodes.resolution: Move the record to review or ready once the contract is accepted.

issueCodes.title: Pack discovery failed
issueCodes.description: A local or installed pack source could not be resolved into a valid pack manifest.
issueCodes.resolution: Check local pack paths and installed `verityspec.packs` entry points, then rerun `verity pack list`.

issueCodes.title: External pack shadows built-in pack
issueCodes.description: A local pack path declares a pack ID that is reserved by a built-in pack.
issueCodes.resolution: Use a distinct external pack ID. Built-in pack IDs cannot be shadowed by local pack paths.

issueCodes.title: Duplicate external pack ID
issueCodes.description: Multiple local pack paths declare the same pack ID.
issueCodes.resolution: Remove the duplicate local path or ensure each external pack has a distinct ID.

issueCodes.title: External pack manifest missing ID
issueCodes.description: A local pack manifest does not declare a string `id` field.
issueCodes.resolution: Add a string `id` field to the pack manifest.

issueCodes.title: External pack manifest invalid
issueCodes.description: A local pack manifest could not be parsed as a JSON object.
issueCodes.resolution: Fix the local pack's `pack.json` file and rerun `verity pack doctor`.

issueCodes.title: External pack manifest missing
issueCodes.description: A local pack path does not contain a `pack.json` manifest.
issueCodes.resolution: Point the path at a pack directory or `pack.json` file.

issueCodes.title: External pack overrides installed pack
issueCodes.description: A local pack path supplies the same pack ID as an installed package entry point and takes precedence.
issueCodes.resolution: Confirm that the local override is intentional, or remove the local path to use the installed pack.

issueCodes.title: External pack path invalid
issueCodes.description: A local pack path could not be resolved.
issueCodes.resolution: Fix the local path or remove the invalid `packPaths`, `--pack-path`, or `verity pack --path` entry.

issueCodes.title: Installed pack shadows built-in pack
issueCodes.description: An installed pack entry point declares a pack ID that is reserved by a built-in pack.
issueCodes.resolution: Rename or uninstall the package. Built-in pack IDs cannot be shadowed by installed packs.

issueCodes.title: Duplicate installed pack ID
issueCodes.description: Multiple installed entry points declare the same pack ID.
issueCodes.resolution: Keep only one installed distribution for that pack ID, or make the duplicate package expose a distinct ID.

issueCodes.title: Installed pack entry point failed
issueCodes.description: An installed `verityspec.packs` entry point could not be imported or called.
issueCodes.resolution: Fix or uninstall the package exposing the failing entry point, then rerun `verity pack doctor`.

issueCodes.title: Installed pack entry point name mismatch
issueCodes.description: An installed entry-point name does not match the resolved pack manifest ID.
issueCodes.resolution: Update the package entry point name so it exactly matches the manifest `id`.

issueCodes.title: Installed pack manifest missing ID
issueCodes.description: An installed pack manifest does not declare a string `id` field.
issueCodes.resolution: Fix the installed package manifest so it declares a string `id`.

issueCodes.title: Installed pack manifest invalid
issueCodes.description: An installed pack manifest could not be parsed as a JSON object.
issueCodes.resolution: Fix or uninstall the package exposing the invalid manifest.

issueCodes.title: Installed pack manifest missing
issueCodes.description: An installed pack entry point resolved to a path without a `pack.json` manifest.
issueCodes.resolution: Fix the entry point so it returns a pack directory or `pack.json` path.

issueCodes.title: Pack mirror ID mismatch
issueCodes.description: An official-extension mirror pack declares a different manifest ID than the source pack being compared.
issueCodes.resolution: Preserve the existing pack ID in the mirror package. Packaging splits must not rename pack IDs or record kinds.

issueCodes.title: Pack mirror invalid
issueCodes.description: A pack mirror path could not be loaded as a pack directory or `pack.json` manifest.
issueCodes.resolution: Point `--mirror` at a valid pack directory or manifest and rerun `verity pack compare`.

issueCodes.title: Pack mirror surface mismatch
issueCodes.description: An official-extension mirror differs from the source pack in schemas, readiness gates, reference rules, generator metadata, or manifest fields.
issueCodes.resolution: Update the mirror fixture or package so its public pack contract matches the source pack, or document and migrate the intentional change before detaching the pack.

issueCodes.title: Unknown pack
issueCodes.description: The requested pack ID is not available.
issueCodes.resolution: Run `verity pack list` and use one of the listed pack IDs.

issueCodes.title: Required profile pack missing
issueCodes.description: The selected product-contract profile requires a pack that is not loaded by the workspace.
issueCodes.resolution: Add the required pack to the workspace, or use a profile that matches the workspace scope.

issueCodes.title: Required profile record kind missing
issueCodes.description: The selected product-contract profile requires at least one record of a specific kind.
issueCodes.resolution: Add the required record kind, or use a profile that matches the workspace scope.

issueCodes.title: Readiness list too small
issueCodes.description: A readiness gate requires a list field to contain at least a minimum number of items.
issueCodes.resolution: Add the required items to the record.

issueCodes.title: Readiness field missing
issueCodes.description: A readiness gate requires a field that is missing or empty.
issueCodes.resolution: Add the required field or adjust the relevant pack readiness gate.

issueCodes.title: Validation runner scanner references required
issueCodes.description: A scanner-backed engine validation runner is missing scanner references.
issueCodes.resolution: Add scannerRefs for scanner-backed runners, or use runnerType device-smoke when the runner validates a built artifact or device runtime directly.

issueCodes.title: Duplicate record ID
issueCodes.description: Two records use the same ID.
issueCodes.resolution: Give each record a unique stable ID.

issueCodes.title: Missing record ID
issueCodes.description: A record does not define a string ID.
issueCodes.resolution: Add an id field that matches the VeritySpec ID pattern.

issueCodes.title: Missing record kind
issueCodes.description: A record does not define a string kind.
issueCodes.resolution: Add a kind field declared by one of the loaded packs.

issueCodes.title: Unknown record kind
issueCodes.description: A record uses a kind not declared by the loaded packs.
issueCodes.resolution: Load the pack that declares the kind or change the record kind.

issueCodes.title: Deprecated reference
issueCodes.description: A record references another record marked deprecated.
issueCodes.resolution: Move the reference to the replacement record or acknowledge it before release.

issueCodes.title: Disallowed reference relationship
issueCodes.description: The source kind, relationship, and target kind combination is not allowed by loaded pack rules.
issueCodes.resolution: Use an allowed relationship or add a pack rule that explicitly permits it.

issueCodes.title: Missing reference target
issueCodes.description: A reference points to a record ID that does not exist in the workspace.
issueCodes.resolution: Create the target record or update the reference target.

issueCodes.title: Removed reference target
issueCodes.description: A record references another record marked removed.
issueCodes.resolution: Remove the reference or point it to an active replacement.

issueCodes.title: Unused schema
issueCodes.description: A schema record has no incoming references.
issueCodes.resolution: Reference the schema from a record or remove it.

issueCodes.title: Schema validation failure
issueCodes.description: A record does not satisfy the JSON Schema for its kind.
issueCodes.resolution: Update the record to match its pack schema.

issueCodes.title: Critical security control not verified
issueCodes.description: A critical security control is release-relevant but is not marked as verified.
issueCodes.resolution: Set coverage to verified and provide a verification method other than not-verified with evidence.

issueCodes.title: Security verification evidence stale
issueCodes.description: A security control declares a review cadence, but its verification date is missing or older than that cadence.
issueCodes.resolution: Update verification.lastVerified after reviewing the evidence, or adjust verification.reviewCadenceDays to the accepted cadence.

issueCodes.title: Invalid workspace dependencies
issueCodes.description: The workspace dependencies field is not an array.
issueCodes.resolution: Set dependencies to an array of local dependency declarations or remove the field.

issueCodes.title: Invalid workspace pack paths
issueCodes.description: A v0.2.0 workspace declares packPaths, but it is not an array of strings.
issueCodes.resolution: Set packPaths to an array of local pack paths, or [] when no external packs are used.

issueCodes.title: Missing workspace pack paths
issueCodes.description: A v0.2.0 workspace must declare packPaths explicitly.
issueCodes.resolution: Run `verity migrate` or add `"packPaths": []` to verityspec.json.

issueCodes.title: Future workspace version
issueCodes.description: The workspace declares a specVersion newer than this VeritySpec CLI supports.
issueCodes.resolution: Install a newer VeritySpec CLI before validating or migrating the workspace.

issueCodes.title: Invalid workspace version
issueCodes.description: The workspace specVersion does not use vMAJOR.MINOR.PATCH format.
issueCodes.resolution: Set specVersion to a supported value such as v0.2.0.

issueCodes.title: Missing workspace version
issueCodes.description: The workspace config does not declare a specVersion.
issueCodes.resolution: Run `verity migrate` or add a supported specVersion to verityspec.json.

issueCodes.title: Unsupported workspace version
issueCodes.description: The workspace declares a version this VeritySpec CLI does not support.
issueCodes.resolution: Run `verity migrate` to produce a supported workspace version.
